description: Add Claude Agent SDK (@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk) as a model provider implementing ModelAdapter interface

userStories.title: Create provider options type and factory scaffold
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the ClaudeAgentSdkProviderOptions type and createClaudeAgentSdkProvider factory function scaffold so the provider structure exists.
acceptanceCriteria: ClaudeAgentSdkProviderOptions interface defined with model, permissionMode, cwd, maxTurns, thinking, effort, mcpServers, allowedTools, disallowedTools, systemPrompt, persistSession, timeout fields
createClaudeAgentSdkProvider() function exported returning ModelAdapter
Provider re-exported from packages/deep-factor-agent/src/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement message conversion (LangChain → SDK)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need LangChain messages (HumanMessage, SystemMessage, ToolMessage, AIMessage) converted to SDK-compatible format for the query() prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: HumanMessage content maps to SDK user message text
SystemMessage extracted and passed as systemPrompt option
AIMessage with tool_calls serialized correctly for context
ToolMessage results included in conversation context
Unit tests for each message type conversion
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: SDK query() takes a prompt string or AsyncIterable<SDKUserMessage>

userStories.title: Implement response parsing (SDK → LangChain)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SDKAssistantMessage and SDKResultMessage parsed into LangChain AIMessage with content and tool_calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Text content blocks from BetaMessage map to AIMessage.content string
tool_use content blocks map to AIMessage.tool_calls array
usage_metadata populated from SDK usage data (input_tokens, output_tokens)
Error results (rate_limit, auth_failed) throw meaningful errors
Unit tests for text-only, tool-call, mixed, and error responses
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement invoke() with SDK query()
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the full invoke() method that calls SDK query(), collects messages, and returns AIMessage.
acceptanceCriteria: invoke() calls query() with converted messages and provider options
maxTurns defaults to 1 for single-turn operation
Collects SDKAssistantMessage from the AsyncGenerator
Returns parsed AIMessage with content and tool_calls
Timeout option respected
Integration test with mocked SDK query()
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement bindTools()
userStories.description: As a developer, I need bindTools() to return a new ModelAdapter with SDK tools configured.
acceptanceCriteria: bindTools() returns new adapter instance with tools
LangChain StructuredToolInterface mapped to SDK allowedTools or MCP tool definitions
Original adapter unchanged (immutable pattern)
Unit test for bindTools creating new adapter with tools
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: SDK has its own tool system; may need to create SDK MCP tools from LangChain tools

userStories.title: Add @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk as optional dependency
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the SDK available as an optional/peer dependency so users can opt-in.
acceptanceCriteria: Package added as optional peerDependency in packages/deep-factor-agent/package.json
Dynamic import in provider (lazy-load, graceful error if not installed)
pnpm install succeeds with and without the SDK installed
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use dynamic import() to avoid hard dependency

userStories.title: End-to-end test with mocked SDK
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an integration test proving the full round-trip: createDeepFactorAgent → invoke → tool calls → result.
acceptanceCriteria: Test creates agent with claude-agent-sdk provider
Mocked SDK returns assistant message with tool call
Agent loop processes tool call and re-invokes
Final result collected successfully
All existing 290+ tests still pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Mock the SDK query() function, not the actual process

userStories.title: Update documentation and exports
userStories.description: As a user, I need documentation on how to use the Claude Agent SDK provider.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md updated with Claude Agent SDK provider usage example
Provider exported from package index
AGENTS.md updated with provider codebase patterns
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Push all changes for code review
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all changes committed and pushed to the feature branch for PR review.
acceptanceCriteria: All changes committed with descriptive commit messages
Branch pushed to origin
Draft PR updated with implementation summary
CI checks pass (if configured)
All tests pass
userStories.notes: Final step - ensure everything is pushed and visible
